creator: wamuir@gmail.com
text:
The port is currently marked as broken for aarch64 as follows:
  - fails to build: java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space

Indeed, the port fails to build with this error on a c6g.medium (64-bit Arm, 2 GiB memory).  Heap constraints are required in this case and, after the patch, the port successfully builds.  I have also built the port on a larger instance (64-bit Arm, 8 GiB memory) and agree that the heap constraints are then unnecessary.
